hypothesis: Baseline: GLV brand voice rules applied as written. Hypothesis: strict adherence to blog-config.md banned phrase list + Canadian English + short paragraphs produces drafts that need minimal revision from Aiden.
learning: Baseline GLV brand voice adherence produced solid, correct drafts. Canadian English, no banned phrases, no em-dashes, short paragraphs, and local Northern Ontario geography (St. Marys River, Goulais Bay, SSM lake-effect snow) all consistently applied. CTAs clear with verified contact info. Weakness: opening hooks were product-description style with no deliberate emotional engineering — reader identity and seasonal context were introduced mid-body rather than leading. Score 7/10: technically compliant, locally grounded, but opening paragraphs leave engagement on the table.
changes_description: Baseline run: strict GLV brand voice adherence — Canadian English, no banned phrases, short paragraphs, local Northern Ontario context, clear CTA. No deliberate hook engineering.
